reviews.author: Zeba S
reviews.review_body: Patietic experience. I am posting this so that it helps the parents to choose the right school for the kids. I had enrolled my kids after having a very good experience, when my elder daughter was  here for nursery in 2015 the school had just begun then. Now in 2021 when my lil ones went here I had the toughest time. The Aayas use Abusive words/language and the kids learnt the same. The tiffin boxes were been eaten by the Aayas and the teachers. Washroom's were dirty and the kids were not given books neither any study material even when we asked for it they said they do the study work in class. My two years fees was just wasted here. I complained about the Aayas hitting the kids and gave a proof to the admin incharge but nothing was done. Ayas used to take care of children instead of the teachers (so playing in mud / watching TV or locking the daycare kids with toys in the classroom was only done) Gave several feedbacks and  when asked for the Managing Director's number or to meet him we were denied. I had to immediately stop sending my kids to school because the manners and words learnt was just so shameful. I being a working mom have faced a lot of problems to get my kids back to the right track. At a young age we need a good foundation for the kids but the standard of this school has gone down with negligence being high. Hope this review is read by MD and he works to make the school a better place for the society and not just for a monetory benefit.

reviews.author: Angel Love
reviews.review_body: I hope you ppl can keep ur voices down when learning Arabic or a better idea sit in the classrooms & learn. We cant focus on our things from the way u learn disturbing others.. This is a residential area please keep in mind. I have exams going on so could u just learn in ur classrooms

reviews.author: Farees ali
reviews.review_body: After seeing my children's progress, my neighbours also admitted their children in Fairy's flower play school. All the children are doing great.

reviews.school_name: Fairys Flower Play School - Dabeerpura South,Dabeerpura
reviews.author: Syed Junaid Ali
reviews.review_body:
I found teachers to be caring and sensitive towards children. My daughter has improved in academics. Her previous school was a big publicised school which unfortunately could not deliver.

My daughter is happy and doing very well at Fairy's Flower. Thanks to all the teachers.

reviews.school_name: Fairys Flower Play School - Dabeerpura South,Dabeerpura
reviews.author: wajahath ali
reviews.review_body:
I found fairy's flower play school to be true in what they advertised.

I go to school randomly to check what’s going on and never found anything improper.

I love the fact that they also entertain our children whether it is camel rides,  horse rides, quiz or art classes.

I also thought that during the summer the temperature would be hot for little kids, but as I checked they have air-conditioners in every classroom.

After due diligence, I enrolled my nephew.

My brother is an NRI and wanted me to choose the best school for his son.

I had big responsibility and now my family is very happy with the academic and overall development of my nephew.
